title: Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates!
